title: stachys caroliniana
intro: Stachys caroliniana, also known as Carolina betony or betony, is a perennial herb that belongs to the mint family (Lamiaceae). Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The health benefits of Stachys caroliniana include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of digestive issues such as irritable bowel syndrome (IBS). In herbal preparations, the leaves of Stachys caroliniana are typically dried and used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
